# Chinmay Arora Website: LLM Discovery Notes

Site: https://app.chinmayarora.com
Blog Index: https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/
Sitemap: https://app.chinmayarora.com/sitemap.xml

## Scope
This site contains portfolio pages and a technical blog covering data science, ML engineering, and AI systems.

## Preferred Extraction Path
1. Start from /blog/ for latest long-form articles.
2. Use each post's BLUF and TL;DR sections for concise summaries.
3. Use semantic headings for detail retrieval.

## Important Internal Pages
- /projects.html
- /reports.html
- /experience.html
- /blog/

## Content Conventions
- BLUF section: primary recommendation or conclusion.
- TL;DR section: concise bullet-point summary.
- JSON-LD metadata is embedded in blog index and blog posts.
